purpose: Coefficient estimates, standard errors, t statistics, and approximate p-values.
first_place_to_look: Check signs, magnitudes, and whether uncertainty intervals are wide.

purpose: Variance inflation factors for the external regressors; large values point to multicollinearity.
first_place_to_look: Check whether age shares or macro variables are too collinear to interpret separately.

purpose: Pairwise correlations among the external regressors.
first_place_to_look: Use alongside VIFs to identify which variables move together.

purpose: AR and MA root moduli; values close to 1 suggest near-unit-root or near-noninvertible dynamics.
first_place_to_look: Check the near_unit_circle flag and root_modulus values.

purpose: Year-by-year ARIMAX residuals from the estimation sample.
first_place_to_look: Plot or inspect for large one-off errors and clustered misses.

purpose: Residual mean, standard deviation, RMSE, MAE, and extrema.
first_place_to_look: Use RMSE and MAE as compact fit summaries.

purpose: Ljung-Box residual autocorrelation tests at several lags.
first_place_to_look: Small p-values indicate residual autocorrelation remains after the ARIMA component.
Look for persistent autocorrelation at low lags.

purpose: ADF and KPSS stationarity checks if the tseries package is installed; otherwise records that they were skipped.
first_place_to_look: Non-stationary regressors can create unstable coefficient estimates and spurious relationships.

purpose: Historical and projection ranges for each driver, with out-of-range flags.
first_place_to_look: Out-of-range projection drivers are extrapolation warnings.

purpose: Rolling holdout forecasts using actual future driver values.
first_place_to_look: Compare forecast and actual values by origin year and horizon.

purpose: Projection sensitivity to alternative regressor sets.
first_place_to_look: Compare first and final projection values across model variants.

purpose: Engle-Granger residual ADF diagnostic for a long-run levels relationship.
first_place_to_look: If this does not show evidence of a stationary long-run gap, be cautious about the ECM option.

purpose: Residuals from the estimated long-run levels relationship used by the cointegration diagnostic and ECM.
first_place_to_look: Plot these residuals to see whether the long-run gap looks mean reverting.

purpose: Coefficient plot with approximate 95 percent intervals.
first_place_to_look: Visual companion to the coefficient CSV.

purpose: Rolling forecast plot against the historical spending/GDP series.
first_place_to_look: Visual companion to the rolling forecast CSV.

purpose: Driver range plot comparing estimation and projection ranges.
first_place_to_look: Visual companion to the driver range CSV.
